titles.title: Distance Between the Problems and the Solution

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: A million miles between earth and God's from heaven Sometimes we think That God is Not far When we think stormy cloud Hear the rising sun God is not far He is the prayer away

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The distance between the problem and the solution Is the distance between knees and the floor The shortcut to reach God in his throne of mercy Is to woke up to him with bended knee

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We think go on and its seems nobody care Sometimes we think God is ignoring us The answer to your prayer seems to be I would bring when you call on his name
